title: Spartan Awakens
description: A mod that adds Chaos Awakens compatibility for Spartan Weaponry.
body:
### This mod adds Chaos Awakens' support for Oblivious Spartan's Spartan Weaponry mod!
Spartan Awakens adds around 200 new spartan weapons made with Chaos Awakens' materials. The only new exclusive trait so far is the Ultimate trait, which just increases the base damage of melee weapons, but increases shooting speed for heavy crossbows and longbows!

Please contact me on discord only if you have any issues related to the add-on at Aqu.#3320

### Spartan Weaponry and Chaos Awakens are required!
Here are the respective links for each mod, make sure to install their dependencies too!:

Chaos Awakens - https://chaosawakens.github.io/?#downloadsDiv

Spartan Weaponry - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-weaponry

### Join the Chaos Awakens discord server! 
https://discord.gg/TmVqnT5Zmj
